Title: Duplicating Food Item
Description:
As an organization or location user 

I want to create and manage food lists 

So that I can organize food items, define temperature ranges, and assign them to locations


In Scope: Portal
Acceptance Criteria:
Scenario: View 3-Dots Menu When Viewing/Editing Existing Food Item
  Given I am viewing or editing an existing food item in the side sheet with manage permission
  Then I see a 3-dots menu in the top right of the side sheet

Scenario: Duplicate Food Item from 3-Dots Menu
  Given I am in the side sheet viewing or editing an existing food item with manage permission
  If I click the 3-dots menu in the top right
  And I select the duplicate option
  Then the current side sheet closes
  And a new side sheet opens in create mode
  And all fields are pre-filled with the values from the original food item
  And the Food Name field is set to "ORIGINAL FOOD NAME - Copy"
  And the duplicated food is added to the Food Items table
